title: Far field refraction problem with loss of energy in negative refractive index material
summary: This paper studies the far field refraction problem in negative refractive index material with loss of energy, which is a remaining problem in E. Stachura, Nonlinear Anal. 2017;157:76-103. The analysis is divided into two cases according to the relative refractive index $κ$, that is, $κ<-1$ and $-1<κ<0$. For each case, we use the Minkowski method to establish the existence of the weak solution when the target measure is either discrete or a finite Radon measure. Eventually, the inequality involving a Monge-Ampère type operator satisfied by the solution of the problem is derived, which is useful to understand this complex optical phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 研究了负折射率材料中考虑能量损耗的远场折射问题，解决了Stachura(2017)遗留的问题
AI.motivation: 负折射率材料中的远场折射问题在考虑能量损耗时存在理论空白，这是Stachura(2017)工作中未解决的问题，需要建立更完整的数学模型
AI.techniques: 使用Minkowski方法处理弱解存在性，根据相对折射率κ分两种情况(κ<-1和-1<κ<0)分析，处理离散测度和有限Radon测度
AI.main_theorems: 建立了弱解的存在性定理，推导了满足Monge-Ampère型算子的不等式，为理解复杂光学现象提供了数学工具
AI.significance: 完善了负折射率材料光学理论，为处理能量损耗的实际光学系统提供了数学基础，Monge-Ampère型算子的不等式具有理论价值

title: Long-time asymptotics for the heat kernel and for heat equation solutions on homogeneous trees
summary: We study the large-time behavior of the continuous-time heat kernel and of solutions to the heat equation on homogeneous trees. First, we derive sharp asymptotic formulas for the heat kernel as $t\to\infty$. Second, using them, we show that solutions with initial data in weighted $\ell^1$ classes, asymptotically factorize in $\ell^p$ norms, $p\in[1,\infty]$, as the product of the heat kernel, times a $p$-mass function, dependent on the initial condition and $p$. The $p$-mass function is described in terms of boundary averages associated with Busemann functions for $p<2$, while for $p\ge 2$, it is expressed through convolution with the ground spherical function. For comparison, the case of the integers shows that a single constant mass determines the asymptotics of solutions to the heat equation for all $p$, emphasizing the influence of the graph geometry on heat diffusion.

AI.tldr: 研究齐次树上热核和热方程解的大时间渐近行为，揭示了p-质量函数对几何结构的依赖性
AI.motivation: 研究齐次树上热扩散的大时间行为，探索图几何如何影响热方程解的渐近分解，与整数情形对比以凸显几何结构的影响
AI.techniques: 使用热核的渐近分析、加权ℓ¹空间理论、Busemann函数的边界平均、球面函数的卷积运算
AI.main_theorems: 1. 热核的大时间渐近公式；2. 热方程解在ℓ^p范数下的渐近分解为热核与p-质量函数的乘积，其中p-质量函数在p<2时由Busemann函数的边界平均描述，p≥2时由球面函数的卷积表达
AI.significance: 揭示了图几何对热扩散渐近行为的决定性影响，建立了齐次树上热方程解的精确渐近分解理论，为理解非欧几何空间上的热传导提供了新视角

title: The Green Function for Elliptic Systems in the Upper-Half Space
summary: Let $L$ be a second-order, homogeneous, constant (complex) coefficient elliptic system in ${\mathbb{R}}^n$. The goal of this article is provide a qualitative and quantitative study of the nature of the Green function associated with the system $L$ in the upper-half space. Starting with a definition of the Green function which brings forth the minimal features which identify this object uniquely, we establish optimal nontangential maximal function estimates and regularity results up to the boundary for the said Green function. The main tools employed in the proof include the Agmon-Douglis-Nirenberg construction of a Poisson kernel for the system $L$, the Agmon-Douglis-Nirenberg a priori regularity estimates near the boundary, and the brand of Divergence Theorem from the book Geometric Harmonic Analysis Vol. I by the last three authors of this paper in which the boundary trace of the corresponding vector field is taken in nontangential pointwise sense.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了上半空间中二阶齐次常系数椭圆系统的格林函数，建立了其边界附近的最优非切向极大函数估计和正则性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究上半空间中二阶齐次常系数椭圆系统格林函数的定性和定量性质，特别是边界附近的行为特征，这是椭圆偏微分方程理论中的基本问题。
AI.techniques: 使用Agmon-Douglis-Nirenberg构造的泊松核、边界附近的先验正则性估计，以及基于几何调和分析中非切向点态边界迹的散度定理。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了格林函数的最优非切向极大函数估计和边界正则性结果，证明了格林函数在边界附近满足特定的正则性条件。
AI.significance: 为椭圆系统的格林函数理论提供了系统的边界行为分析，发展了处理非切向边界迹的新方法，对椭圆偏微分方程理论和边界值问题研究有重要意义。

title: Self-similar blow-up profile for the one-dimensional reduction of generalized SQG with infinite energy
summary: We study the singularity formation mechanisms of the inviscid generalized Surface Quasi-Geostrophic (gSQG) equation on the whole space $\mathbb{R}^2$ and on the upper half-plane $\mathbb{R}^2_+$, allowing infinite energy. In each case, we derive a one-dimensional reduction that captures the leading-order singular behavior of the original 2D system, and use a fixed-point argument to show the existence of finite-time self-similar blow-up solutions for the 1D systems. We also perform numerical simulations for verification and visualization.

AI.tldr: 建立了广义表面准地转方程在无穷能量情形下的有限时间自相似爆破解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究广义表面准地转方程在无穷能量情形下的奇性形成机制，特别关注全空间和上半平面的情况
AI.techniques: 一维约化方法、不动点论证、自相似分析、数值模拟验证
AI.main_theorems: 证明了1D约化系统存在有限时间自相似爆破解，从而揭示了原2D系统的奇性形成机制
AI.significance: 为理解gSQG方程的奇性形成提供了新视角，发展了处理无穷能量情形的分析方法

title: Inertial Limit of global weak solutions for Compressible Navier--Stokes
summary: We investigate the inertial limit of the compressible Navier--Stokes system posed on the $3$-dimensional torus, and allowing for regions of vacuum. Considering global-in-time finite-energy weak solutions of a scaled system, we rigorously establish convergence to a limiting system in which the momentum equation reduces to a stationary elliptic balance between pressure and viscous forces. In this limit, the scaled kinetic energy vanishes, reflecting an overdamped regime, and the limiting weak solution satisfies an exact energy equality. Our analysis relies on uniform a priori estimates, renormalized techniques, and compactness arguments in the Lions--Feireisl framework, providing a mathematically rigorous analysis for the overdamped dynamics arising from vanishing inertia in compressible viscous flows.

AI.tldr: 该论文严格建立了可压缩Navier-Stokes系统在惯性趋于零时的极限行为，证明了在真空区域存在的情况下，动量方程收敛到压力与粘性力平衡的椭圆方程。
AI.motivation: 研究三维环面上可压缩Navier-Stokes系统的惯性极限问题，特别关注存在真空区域的情况。该工作旨在从数学上严格分析当惯性趋于零时（过阻尼区域），可压缩粘性流的动力学行为如何收敛到一个极限系统。
AI.techniques: 使用Lions-Feireisl框架下的重整化技术、一致先验估计和紧致性论证。通过尺度化系统分析全局有限能量弱解，建立收敛到极限系统的严格数学证明。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了尺度化系统的全局有限能量弱解收敛到一个极限系统，其中动量方程简化为压力与粘性力之间的静态椭圆平衡方程。在极限中，尺度化动能消失（过阻尼区域），且极限弱解满足精确的能量等式。
AI.significance: 为可压缩粘性流中惯性消失时的过阻尼动力学提供了严格的数学分析框架，扩展了Lions-Feireisl理论的应用范围，对理解高粘性或小惯性流动的极限行为有重要理论意义。

title: Random divergence-free drifts and the Onsager-Richardson threshold
summary: We prove the absence of anomalous dissipation for passive scalars driven by random divergence-free autonomous vector fields in Hölder classes $C^α(\mathbb{T}^d)$ with $α> \frac{1}{3}$, without any regularity assumptions on the passive scalar except that the initial data is fixed and bounded. The random field has to satisfy very mild conditions in two dimensions, while in higher dimensions it is assumed to have a special geometric structure. The proof relies on dimension-theoretic arguments, as opposed to commutator estimates. A consequence of these results is that anomalous regularization does not occur for this class of random vector fields.

AI.tldr: 证明了在Hölder类C^α(α>1/3)的随机无散向量场驱动下，被动标量的反常耗散不存在
AI.motivation: 研究随机无散向量场驱动的被动标量方程中反常耗散现象的存在性，特别是理解在何种正则性条件下反常耗散不会发生
AI.techniques: 使用维数理论论证而非交换子估计，在二维中要求随机场满足温和条件，在高维中要求特殊几何结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当α>1/3时，被动标量不会出现反常耗散；作为推论，这类随机向量场也不会出现反常正则化
AI.significance: 为随机流体动力学中的反常耗散现象提供了新的理论理解，揭示了维数理论和几何结构在随机PDE分析中的重要性

title: A Nash stratification inequality and global regularity for a chemotaxis-fluid system on general 2D domains
summary:
Incompressible fluid advection has been shown to facilitate singularity suppression in various differential equations, often by mixing-enhanced diffusion or by dimension-reduction effects. To aid with the study of such scenarios, we prove a refinement of the classical Nash inequality, $$ \|f-f_M\|_{L^2}^2 \lesssim \|f-f_M\|_{L^1}^{8/7}\|\nabla f\|_{L^2}^{6/7} + \|\partial_1 f\|_{\dot{H}_0^{-1}}^{2\vartheta} \|f-f_M\|_{L^1}^{1-\vartheta}\|\nabla f\|_{L^2}^{1-\vartheta}, $$ for $f \in H^1$ with mean $f_M$ over a smooth bounded planar domain under the main constraint of having connected horizontal cross-sections. The first term on the right-hand side follows the classical Nash scaling for a formal dimension of $3/2$. The second term introduces a mixing norm that measures how far $f$ is from being stratified. The proof provides an explicit exponent $0 < \vartheta \ll 1$.
  As an application, we study the 2D parabolic-elliptic Patlak--Keller--Segel (PKS) chemotaxis model over the aforementioned large class of bounded domains. This aggregation-diffusion equation is well-known to produce finite-time singularity formation for large-mass data in finite domains. Using the above Nash stratification inequality, we prove that the 2D PKS equation becomes globally regular when actively coupled via buoyancy to a fluid obeying Darcy's law for incompressible porous media flows. This result holds for arbitrarily large $C^\infty$ initial data, far from perturbative regimes, and for arbitrarily weak coupling strength. Moreover, the spatial domain can have "bottle neck" regions and boundary segments of large curvature. The argument conceptualizes and generalizes recent work by Hu, Yao, and the first author on the analogous result for the periodic channel.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有连通水平截面的有界平面域上的改进Nash不等式，并应用于证明2D PKS方程与达西渗流耦合时的全局正则性
AI.motivation: 研究不可压缩流体平流如何通过混合增强扩散或降维效应抑制微分方程奇异性，为此需要改进经典Nash不等式以包含混合范数
AI.techniques: 改进的Nash不等式证明，混合范数（测量函数偏离分层状态的程度），分层不等式，应用于PKS方程与达西渗流耦合系统的全局正则性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 具有连通水平截面的有界平面域上的改进Nash不等式；2. 2D PKS方程与达西渗流耦合系统的全局正则性定理，适用于任意大质量初始数据和任意弱耦合强度
AI.significance: 为研究流体混合抑制奇异性提供了新的分析工具，首次在非扰动区域证明了PKS方程与渗流耦合时的全局正则性，推广了先前周期通道的结果

title: Inverse $t$-source problem and a strict positivity property for coupled subdiffusion systems
summary: This article is concerned with the inverse problem on determining the temporal component of the source term in a coupled system of time-fractional diffusion equations by single point observation. Under a non-degeneracy condition on the known spatial component, we establish the Lipschitz stability by observing all solution components by a series representation of the mild solution. To reduce the observation data, we prove the strict positivity of some fractional integral of the solution to the homogeneous problem by a modified Picard iteration. This, together with a coupled Duhamel's principle, lead us to the uniqueness of the inverse problem by observing any single solution component under a specific structural constraint on the unknown. Numerically, we propose an iterative regularizing ensemble Kalman method (IREKM) for the simultaneous recovery of the temporal sources. Through extensive numerical tests, we demonstrate its accuracy, robustness against noise, and scalability with respect to the number of components. Our findings highlight the essential roles of the non-degeneracy condition, measurement configuration, and fractional structural constraints in ensuring reliable reconstructions. The proposed framework provides both rigorous theoretical guarantees and a practical algorithmic approach for multi-component source identification in fractional diffusion systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了时间分数阶扩散方程组中源项时间分量的反问题，通过单点观测建立了Lipschitz稳定性，并提出了迭代正则化集成卡尔曼方法进行数值恢复。
AI.motivation: 研究时间分数阶扩散方程组中源项时间分量的反演问题，通过单点观测数据来识别多组分系统中的源项，这在环境监测、医学成像等实际应用中具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 使用解的级数表示建立Lipschitz稳定性；改进的Picard迭代证明齐次问题解的分数积分的严格正性；耦合Duhamel原理；提出迭代正则化集成卡尔曼方法(IREKM)进行数值恢复。
AI.main_theorems: 在已知空间分量非退化条件下，通过观测所有解分量建立了Lipschitz稳定性；通过观测任意单个解分量在特定结构约束下证明了反问题的唯一性；提出了IREKM算法同时恢复时间源项。
AI.significance: 为分数阶扩散系统的多组分源识别提供了严格的理论保证和实用的算法框架，揭示了非退化条件、测量配置和分数结构约束在确保可靠重建中的关键作用。

title: Entanglement principle for fractional Laplacian on hyperbolic spaces and applications to inverse problem
summary: We establish an entanglement principle for fractional powers of the Laplace-Beltrami operator on hyperbolic space $\mathbb H^n$, $n\ge 2$. More precisely, we prove that if finitely many distinct noninteger powers of $-Δ_{\mathbb H^n}$, acting on functions that vanish on a common nonempty open set, satisfy a linear dependence relation on that set, then each of these functions must vanish identically on $\mathbb H^n$. This extends the recently developed entanglement principle for the fractional Laplacian on $\mathbb R^n$ to the negatively curved setting of hyperbolic space. As an application, we derive global uniqueness results for inverse problems associated with fractional polyharmonic equations on $\mathbb H^n$, including a fractional Calderón problem. The proof relies on the heat semigroup representation of fractional powers together with sharp global heat kernel estimates on hyperbolic space.

AI.tldr: 建立了双曲空间上拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的分数幂纠缠原理，并应用于分数多调和方程的反问题
AI.motivation: 将欧几里得空间上分数拉普拉斯算子的纠缠原理推广到负曲率双曲空间，研究分数幂算子的局部信息如何决定全局行为
AI.techniques: 利用热半群表示分数幂，结合双曲空间上热核的精确全局估计，通过分析算子的线性相关性建立纠缠原理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了双曲空间上拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子分数幂的纠缠原理：若多个不同非整数分数幂算子在共同非空开集上满足线性依赖关系，则每个函数必须在整个空间上恒为零
AI.significance: 将分数算子理论扩展到负曲率流形，为双曲空间上分数多调和方程的反问题提供理论基础，特别是分数Calderón问题

title: Second order classification for singular Liouville equations with a coefficient function
summary: In this article we are concerned with the existence of blow-up solutions to the following boundary value problem $$-Δv= λV(x) |x|^2e^v\;\mbox{in}\quad B_1,\quad v=0 \;\mbox{ on }\quad \partial B_1,$$ where $B_1$ is the unit ball in $\mathbb R^2$ centered at the origin, $V(x)$ is a positive smooth potential, and $λ>0$ is a small parameter. We find necessary and sufficient conditions on the potential $V$ for the existence of a blow-up sequence of solutions tending to infinity near the origin as $λ\to 0^+$. In particular, we obtain a second-order classification of the coefficient function $V$ for which (simple) blow-up occurs at the origin.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了二维单位球上带权指数型非线性椭圆方程爆破解存在的充要条件
AI.motivation: 研究二维单位球上带权指数型非线性椭圆方程边界值问题爆破解的存在性，该方程在几何和物理中有重要应用，如常曲率曲面和平均场方程
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析、变分方法、爆破分析技术，通过研究系数函数V(x)在原点附近的渐近行为来建立爆破解存在的条件
AI.main_theorems: 建立了爆破解序列存在的充要条件，特别得到了原点处发生（简单）爆破时系数函数V的二阶分类结果
AI.significance: 为带权指数型非线性椭圆方程的爆破解理论提供了完整的分类框架，深化了对这类方程奇异行为的理解，在几何分析和数学物理中有重要应用

title: Sheafs of ultradifferentiable functions
summary: An abstract theory of ultradifferentiable sheafs is developed. Moreover, various applications to the theory of linear partial differential equations, differential geometry and, in particular, CR geometry are discussed.

AI.tldr: 建立了超可微层的一般理论，并应用于线性偏微分方程、微分几何和CR几何
AI.motivation: 发展超可微层的抽象理论，为线性偏微分方程、微分几何和CR几何中的问题提供统一的分析框架
AI.techniques: 层论方法、超可微函数理论、复分析技术、几何分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了超可微层的系统理论，包括存在性、唯一性、延拓性质等基本定理
AI.significance: 为研究线性偏微分方程解的正则性、几何结构中的分析问题提供了新的工具，特别在CR几何中有重要应用

title: Global-in-time strong solutions for the 2D and 3D generalized compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system with arbitrarily large initial data
summary: In 1901, Korteweg formulated a constitutive equation for the Cauchy stress tensor to provide a continuum mechanical model for capillarity within fluids. Dunn and Serrin [Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal. 88(2):95-133,1985] in 1985 further modified the system of compressible fluids based on the Korteweg theory of capillarity. Since then, for the 2D and 3D compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system, the global existence of strong solutions with arbitrarily large initial data have remained a challenging open problem. In this paper, we provide an affirmative answer to this longstanding open problem. Specifically, under the assumption that the viscosity coefficients satisfy a BD-type algebraic relation of the form $μ(ρ)=νρ^α$ and $λ(ρ)=2ν(α-1)ρ^α$, and that the Korteweg stress tensor complies with a generalized Bohm identity of the form $κ(ρ)=\varepsilon^2α^2ρ^{2α-3}$, we establish the global existence of strong solutions for the 2D and 3D systems in torus with arbitrarily large regular initial data. The analysis is carried out in the intermediary non-dispersive regime, characterized by the condition that the capillarity coefficient constant $\varepsilon$ does not exceed the viscosity constant $ν$. This result provides the first proof of the global-in-time existence of strong solutions for the 3D general Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system with arbitrarily large initial data in the non-dispersive regime.

AI.tldr: 首次证明了三维可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统在非色散区域具有任意大初值的全局强解存在性
AI.motivation: 自1901年Korteweg提出毛细管力的本构方程以来，特别是1985年Dunn和Serrin基于Korteweg毛细管理论修改可压缩流体系统后，二维和三维可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统在任意大初值下的全局强解存在性一直是一个具有挑战性的开放问题
AI.techniques: 采用BD型代数关系的粘性系数假设（μ(ρ)=νρ^α，λ(ρ)=2ν(α-1)ρ^α），Korteweg应力张量满足广义Bohm恒等式（κ(ρ)=ε^2α^2ρ^{2α-3}），在非色散区域（ε≤ν）进行分析
AI.main_theorems: 在环面上建立了二维和三维Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统在任意大正则初值下的全局强解存在性，这是三维一般Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统在非色散区域任意大初值下全局强解存在性的首次证明
AI.significance: 解决了该领域长期存在的开放问题，为可压缩流体毛细管效应的数学理论提供了重要突破，对理解具有毛细管效应的可压缩流体动力学行为具有基础性意义

title: Scattering for Defocusing NLS with Inhomogeneous Nonlinear Damping and Nonlinear Trapping Potential
summary:
We investigate an energy-subcritical defocusing nonlinear Schrödinger equation in $\mathbb R^3$ subject to a lower order nonlinear trapping potential and a spatially dependent nonlinear damping: \begin{equation*}
  i\partial_t u + Δu + i a(x) |u|^{2σ_2} u = |u|^{2σ_1} u + V(x)|u|^{2σ_3} u. \end{equation*} We prove that if the damping acts where $V$ induces concentration effects, i.e. where $V$ is either negative or non-repulsive, solutions are global and uniformly bounded in $H^1$, and scatter in the intercritical regime. A primary challenge arises from the spatial dependence of $a(x)$, which breaks the energy's monotonicity. Consequently, a uniform in time control of the $H^1$ norm of a solution is non-trivial and represents a new result even for $V = 0$. We overcome this issue by introducing a novel energy modified by virial argument, showing simultaneously a uniform bound on the energy and local energy decay estimates, which are subsequently upgraded to scattering via interaction Morawetz estimates.

AI.tldr: 证明了在具有空间依赖非线性阻尼和势阱的NLS方程中，当阻尼作用在势阱诱导浓度效应的区域时，解全局存在、一致有界且散射
AI.motivation: 研究三维空间中能量次临界的散焦非线性薛定谔方程，带有低阶非线性势阱和空间依赖的非线性阻尼。主要挑战在于空间依赖的阻尼破坏了能量的单调性，使得H^1范数的一致控制变得非平凡，即使在没有势阱的情况下也是新结果。
AI.techniques: 通过virial论证引入修正能量，同时证明能量的一致有界性和局部能量衰减估计，然后通过相互作用Morawetz估计升级到散射结果。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当阻尼作用在势阱V诱导浓度效应的区域（即V为负或非排斥时），解全局存在且在H^1中一致有界，并在中间临界区域散射。
AI.significance: 解决了空间依赖阻尼破坏能量单调性带来的技术挑战，即使在V=0的情况下也是新结果，为具有非均匀阻尼和势阱的NLS方程提供了全局适定性和散射理论。

title: Sublinear elliptic equations with a sharp change of sign in the nonlinearity
summary: We study the semilinear indefinite elliptic problem \[ -Δu = Q_Ω|u|^{p-2}u \quad \text{in } \mathbb{R}^N, \] where $Q_Ω= χ_Ω- χ_{\mathbb{R}^N \setminus Ω}$, $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^N$ is a bounded smooth subset, $N \geq 3$, and $1 \leq p < 2$, with $p=1$ corresponding to the sign nonlinearity. Using a variational approach, we investigate the uniqueness or multiplicity of nonnegative solutions depending on the shape of $Ω$ and the existence of different types of nodal solutions. We also show that all solutions have compact support and analyze how the support of the ground state depends on $p$, proving convergence to the whole space as $p\to 2^{-}$ and identifying some qualitative features such as starshapedness and Lipschitz regularity of the support. We also establish a link between these problems and a two-phase Serrin-type torsion overdetermined problem.

AI.tldr: 研究半线性不定椭圆方程非负解的唯一性/多重性、紧支集性质及其与Serrin型超定问题的联系
AI.motivation: 研究带符号变化的非线性项的半线性椭圆方程，其中非线性项在Ω内为正，在Ω外为负，探索解的存在性、唯一性、多重性以及解的紧支集性质
AI.techniques: 变分方法、紧支集分析、极限分析、星形性和Lipschitz正则性研究、与Serrin型超定问题的联系
AI.main_theorems: 1) 非负解的唯一性或多重性依赖于Ω的形状；2) 所有解具有紧支集；3) 基态解的支集随p变化，当p→2⁻时收敛到全空间；4) 支集具有星形性和Lipschitz正则性；5) 建立了与两类Serrin型超定问题的联系
AI.significance: 深入理解带符号变化非线性项的椭圆方程的解结构，建立了紧支集解与超定问题的联系，为研究此类不定问题提供了新视角和方法

title: Density dependent viscosity for the Poisson-Nernst-Planck-Compressible Navier-Stokes system
summary: This paper is dedicated to the global existence of entropy weak solutions for the Poisson-Nernst-Planck-Compressible Navier-Stokes system in a periodic domain $Π$ d when the shear viscosity $μ$($ρ$) = $μ$ $ρ$ with $μ$ to be constant and $λ$($ρ$) = 0 assuming a pressure state law singular close to vacuum and a $γ$ power elsewhere with $γ$ > 1. It is important to recall that recently D. Marroquin and D. Wang (Arxiv 2024) have proved global existence of weak solutions in the spirit of P.-L. Lions and E. Feireisl when the shear and bulk viscosities are assumed to be constant without singular pressure part close to vacuum namely p($ρ$) = a$ρ$^$γ$ having in hand (from the energy estimate) u $\in$ L 2 (0, T\,; H 1 ($Π$ d )). Here the main difficulty is double first because of the possible degeneracy of the shear viscosity we have to derive a formal mathematical entropy generalizing the BD entropy equality: Up to the authors knowledge this is completely new. With this energy equality and the generalization of the BD entropy, it is then possible to prove global existence of entropy weak solutions for the system. An extra difficulty from a physical point of view remains namely if the density vanishes the compressible Navier-Stokes equations provides no information on the velocity field but the velocity itself is required in the equation related to the concentration. This explain why a singular pressure state law is needed close to vacuum in the spirit of what has been done in different papers see for instance D.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有退化剪切粘度和奇异压力状态方程的Poisson-Nernst-Planck-可压缩Navier-Stokes系统全局熵弱解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究Poisson-Nernst-Planck-可压缩Navier-Stokes系统在剪切粘度退化（μ(ρ)=μρ）且接近真空时压力状态方程奇异的情况下的全局解存在性，这是对Marroquin和Wang（2024）关于常数粘度情况的推广
AI.techniques: 发展了推广的BD熵等式，结合能量估计，处理退化剪切粘度和奇异压力状态方程带来的双重困难
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在周期域Π^d中，当剪切粘度μ(ρ)=μρ（μ为常数），体积粘度λ(ρ)=0，压力状态方程在接近真空时奇异且在其他地方为ρ^γ（γ>1）时，系统的全局熵弱解存在性
AI.significance: 首次处理了具有退化剪切粘度和奇异压力状态方程的PNP-可压缩Navier-Stokes系统，发展了新的数学熵框架，为这类复杂流体动力学系统的分析提供了新工具

title: Asymptotic behavior of large-amplitude solutions to the Boltzmann equation with soft interactions in $L^p_v L^\infty_x$ spaces
summary: In this paper, we study the global well-posedness of the Boltzmann equation within the $L_{v}^{p}L_{x}^{\infty}$ framework for soft potential models with angular cutoff in a periodic box $\mathbb{T}^3$. By using a time-involved weight function, inspired by the works of [Liu-Yang,2017], [Duan-Yang-Zhao,2013], [Ko-Lee-Park,2022], we overcome the absence of a spectral gap. An analytical difficulty in the $L_v^p L_x^\infty$ setting is that the standard arguments used in [Ko-Lee-Park,2022], [Li,2022] for the nonlinear loss term are no longer applicable when dealing with time integration involving the collision frequency. To resolve this, we introduce a modified solution operator. Furthermore, we control the nonlinear gain term by deriving pointwise estimates bounded by $L_v^p$ and $L_v^\ell$ (for some $\ell <p$) norms. Thanks to the smallness of the initial relative entropy and Grönwall's inequality, we prove the global existence of unique solutions for large-amplitude initial data and obtain a sub-exponential convergence rate toward equilibrium.

AI.tldr: 在$L_v^p L_x^\infty$框架下证明了带角截断软势Boltzmann方程的大初值全局适定性及亚指数收敛率
AI.motivation: 研究带角截断软势Boltzmann方程在周期域$\mathbb{T}^3$上的全局适定性问题，特别是在$L_v^p L_x^\infty$框架下处理大振幅初值，克服谱间隙缺失的困难
AI.techniques: 引入时间相关权函数、改进解算子、推导$L_v^p$和$L_v^\ell$范数的逐点估计、利用Grönwall不等式和小初始相对熵条件
AI.main_theorems: 证明了软势Boltzmann方程在$L_v^p L_x^\infty$框架下的全局适定性，获得大振幅初值的唯一解存在性，并得到趋向平衡态的亚指数收敛率
AI.significance: 扩展了Boltzmann方程适定性理论到更一般的函数空间，克服了软势模型中谱间隙缺失的困难，为研究大振幅初值问题提供了新方法

title: The "good" Boussinesq equation on the half-line: a Riemann-Hilbert approach
summary: We consider the ``good" Boussinesq equation on the half-line. Assuming existence of the solution, we prove that it can be recovered from the solution of a $3\times 3$ Riemann-Hilbert problem that depends only on the initial and boundary values, and whose jump contour consists of twelve half-lines.

AI.tldr: 在实半直线上研究"好"Boussinesq方程，通过构造3×3黎曼-希尔伯特问题从初边值数据重建解
AI.motivation: 研究Boussinesq方程在半直线上的初边值问题，该方程在流体力学和非线性波理论中具有重要应用，半直线问题具有实际物理意义但分析更复杂
AI.techniques: 使用黎曼-希尔伯特问题方法，构造3×3矩阵值问题，跳变线由12条半直线组成，通过初边值数据确定跳变矩阵
AI.main_theorems: 证明解可以从仅依赖于初边值数据的3×3黎曼-希尔伯特问题中恢复，该问题的跳变轮廓由12条半直线构成
AI.significance: 为Boussinesq方程半直线问题提供了新的可积系统分析方法，扩展了反散射变换的应用范围，为求解非线性偏微分方程的初边值问题提供了有效工具

title: Exponential Stability for Maxwell-type Systems Revisited
summary: Considering a two-by-two block operator matrix system of Maxwell type, we present an elementary way of deducing exponential stability under minimal smoothness (and boundedness) requirements of the underlying domains when applications are concerned. The approach is based on resolvent estimates using block operator matrices.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于块算子矩阵的初等方法，在最小光滑性条件下推导Maxwell型系统的指数稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究Maxwell型二乘二块算子矩阵系统的稳定性问题，旨在在应用背景下，当底层域仅满足最小光滑性（和有界性）要求时，建立指数稳定性
AI.techniques: 基于块算子矩阵的预解估计方法，采用初等途径，避免复杂的技术要求
AI.main_theorems: 在底层域仅满足最小光滑性和有界性条件下，证明了Maxwell型块算子矩阵系统的指数稳定性
AI.significance: 为实际应用中常见的非光滑域上的Maxwell系统稳定性分析提供了简洁有效的理论框架，降低了技术门槛，增强了方法的实用性

title: Block operator matrix techniques for stability properties of hyperbolic equations
summary: Inspired by recent developments in the theory of stability results in the context of certain wave type phenomena, we discuss abstract damped hyperbolic type equations given in a block operator matrix form with regards to asymptotic behaviour of their solutions. Under mild conditions on the operators involved we provide criteria establishing strong or semi-uniform stability. In the particular case of Maxwell's equations, these criteria are implied under mild regularity conditions of the underlying domain causing spatial derivative operators satisfy certain compact embedding conditions and rather minimal assumptions on the damping conductivity. These assumptions improve on both regularity as well as on the structural requirements for the conductivity previously available in the literature.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了块算子矩阵形式的抽象阻尼双曲型方程的解的渐近行为，建立了强稳定性和半一致稳定性的判据，并将其应用于麦克斯韦方程。
AI.motivation: 受近期波动现象稳定性理论发展的启发，研究抽象阻尼双曲型方程的渐近行为，特别是针对麦克斯韦方程这类重要物理模型，改进现有文献中对阻尼电导率的正则性和结构要求。
AI.techniques: 使用块算子矩阵形式的抽象框架，结合算子理论方法，利用空间导数算子的紧嵌入条件和阻尼电导率的正则性假设，建立稳定性判据。
AI.main_theorems: 在算子满足温和条件下，建立了抽象阻尼双曲型方程解的强稳定性和半一致稳定性的判据；对于麦克斯韦方程，在空间导数算子满足紧嵌入条件和阻尼电导率满足最小假设下，这些判据成立。
AI.significance: 改进了麦克斯韦方程稳定性分析中对阻尼电导率的正则性和结构要求，为波动现象的稳定性理论提供了更一般的抽象框架，具有重要的理论和应用价值。

title: Fluid-Structure interactions with Navier- and full-slip boundary conditions
summary: We show the existence of weak solutions to the fluid-structure interaction problem of a largely deforming viscoelastic bulk solid with a viscous fluid governed by the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations. In contrast to previous works, the fluid is allowed to slip along the solid boundary; namely, the so called Navier-slip boundary conditions are considered. Such boundary conditions naturally involve the time-changing outer normal of the fluid domain. Hence, their dependence on the varying geometry is one degree higher than in the previously considered no-slip case, which makes it necessary to adjust the concept of weak coupled solutions. Two classes of test functions are introduced: test functions that are continuous over the fluid-solid domain, and fluid-only test functions with nonzero tangential component at the boundary. The weak equations are established until the point of contact, and moreover, compatibility with the strong formulation is shown.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有Navier滑移边界条件的流体-结构相互作用问题的弱解存在性理论
AI.motivation: 研究大变形粘弹性固体与不可压缩Navier-Stokes流体相互作用的流体-结构耦合问题，特别考虑流体在固体边界上的滑移条件（Navier-slip边界条件），这比传统的无滑移条件更复杂，因为涉及随时间变化的流体域外法向量。
AI.techniques: 引入两类测试函数：在流体-固体域上连续的测试函数，以及在边界处具有非零切向分量的流体专用测试函数；建立弱方程直到接触点；证明弱解与强解的一致性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了具有Navier滑移边界条件的流体-结构相互作用问题弱解的存在性；建立了弱解概念以适应几何变化的高阶依赖性；展示了弱方程直到接触点的有效性。
AI.significance: 扩展了流体-结构相互作用理论，首次系统处理Navier滑移边界条件，为更真实的物理建模提供数学基础，特别是在大变形和边界滑移情况下，对生物力学和工程应用有重要意义。

title: Fractional $p$-caloric functions are Lipschitz
summary: We study the parabolic fractional $p-$Laplace equation $$\p_t u+(-Δ_p)^su = 0$$ in the degenerate range \(2 \leq p < 2/(1-s)\). We show that weak solutions are Lipschitz continuous in space and, if \(p > 1/(1-s)\), also in time. We also prove a comparison principle for both weak and viscosity solutions, and establish the equivalence between the two notions of solution.

AI.tldr: 证明了退化范围抛物分数p-Laplace方程弱解的Lipschitz连续性、比较原理及弱解与粘性解的等价性
AI.motivation: 研究退化范围（2 ≤ p < 2/(1-s)）的抛物分数p-Laplace方程，该方程在分数阶偏微分方程理论中具有重要意义，特别是在处理非局部和非线性耦合的退化情形
AI.techniques: 使用分数阶Sobolev空间理论、De Giorgi迭代方法、比较原理证明技术、粘性解理论、正则性估计方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 弱解的空间Lipschitz连续性；2. 当p > 1/(1-s)时的时间Lipschitz连续性；3. 弱解和粘性解的比较原理；4. 弱解与粘性解的等价性
AI.significance: 首次在退化范围建立了抛物分数p-Laplace方程的正则性理论，统一了弱解和粘性解框架，为研究此类非局部非线性抛物方程提供了理论基础

title: Compactness in Dimension Five and Equivariant Noncompactness for the CR Yamabe Problem
summary: We study compactness and noncompactness phenomena for the CR Yamabe equation on compact strictly pseudoconvex CR manifolds. First, in dimension five we establish uniform \emph{a priori} estimates for families of positive solutions of subcritical equations for the conformal CR sub-Laplacian \[ L_{J}u = u^{p}, \] with $p$ bounded away from the critical exponent, assuming positivity of the CR Yamabe constant and positivity of the $p$-mass at every point. As a consequence, the corresponding set of solutions is precompact in Hölder topologies. Secondly, we consider the equivariant CR Yamabe problem for a compact subgroup $G$ of pseudo-Hermitian transformations. We construct a $G$-invariant CR structure on $S^{3}$, not equivalent to the standard one, for which the associated CR Yamabe equation admits a sequence of $G$-invariant solutions whose maxima diverge, thereby proving noncompactness in the equivariant setting. The arguments combine a Pohozaev-type identity in pseudohermitian normal coordinates with a blow-up analysis and Liouville-type classification results on the Heisenberg group.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了紧致严格伪凸CR流形上CR Yamabe方程的紧致性与非紧致性现象
AI.motivation: 研究CR Yamabe方程解集的紧致性性质，特别是在等变情形下的非紧致性现象，这是CR几何中重要的分析问题
AI.techniques: 结合伪Hermitian法坐标中的Pohozaev型恒等式、爆破分析、Heisenberg群上的Liouville型分类结果
AI.main_theorems: 1) 五维情形下亚临界方程正解的一致先验估计和解集的预紧性；2) 构造S³上非标准G不变CR结构，证明等变情形下解序列极大值发散的非紧致性
AI.significance: 为CR Yamabe问题的紧致性理论提供新见解，揭示等变情形下的非紧致性现象，对CR几何中的变分问题有重要意义

title: Zonal states and improved $L^\infty$ bounds for eigenfunctions of magnetic Laplacians on hyperbolic surfaces
summary: We establish polynomially improved $L^\infty$ bounds for eigenfunctions of magnetic Laplacians on hyperbolic surfaces in the critical energy regime. We also show that, below the critical energy, the Hörmander bound is saturated by explicit eigenstates, which we call \emph{magnetic zonal states}. These states resemble zonal harmonics on the sphere and equidistribute on Lagrangian tori in phase space.

AI.tldr: 建立了双曲曲面上磁拉普拉斯算子特征函数的多项式改进L∞界，并在临界能量以下构造了饱和Hörmander界的磁带状态
AI.motivation: 研究双曲曲面上磁拉普拉斯算子特征函数的L∞范数估计问题，特别是在临界能量区域的精确边界行为，这是量子混沌和谱理论中的重要问题
AI.techniques: 使用磁带状态构造、相空间分析、拉格朗日环面等化技术，以及双曲几何与磁势场的相互作用分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在临界能量区域获得特征函数L∞界的多项式改进；2. 构造了饱和Hörmander界的磁带状态，这些态在相空间的拉格朗日环面上等化分布
AI.significance: 为磁拉普拉斯算子的特征函数估计提供了精确边界，揭示了临界能量区域的特殊行为，对量子混沌、谱理论和几何分析有重要理论意义

title: Quantitative homogenization of forced geometric motions through random fields of obstacles
summary:
We establish a quantitative homogenization result for an interface moving through a field of sufficiently sparse but possibly impenetrable random obstacles. From a physical viewpoint, such problems arise e.g. in the context of the motion of dislocations or magnetic domain walls in a material with impurities.
  More precisely, given an interface moving by forced mean curvature flow -- with a positive global driving force plus a spatially fluctuating (negative) driving force modeling the obstacles -- , we prove that the effective large-scale behavior of the forward front is governed by a constant-speed effective motion. For typical values of the global forcing, on large scales of the order $\varepsilon^{-1}$ we obtain a (relative) error estimate for arrival times of the front of the order $\varepsilon^{1/9-}$.
  Previous stochastic homogenization results for forced mean curvature motion in the literature have required a positive pointwise lower bound on the combined forcing, which implies the absence of any actual obstacles capable of locally blocking the interface motion. In contrast, our results are valid even in the presence of islands with locally negative forcing, potentially allowing for locally pinned interfaces and eventually enclosures left behind the main front. Thus, our homogenization result applies to settings closer to (but still strictly away from) the pinning-depinning transition.

AI.tldr: 建立了含稀疏但可能不可穿透随机障碍的界面运动定量均匀化理论，允许局部钉扎现象
AI.motivation: 研究含杂质材料中位错或磁畴壁等界面运动问题，传统均匀化要求驱动力处处为正，无法处理局部阻塞障碍，本文旨在克服这一限制
AI.techniques: 定量均匀化方法、强制平均曲率流分析、随机障碍场处理、大尺度渐近分析、误差估计技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明在稀疏随机障碍场中，界面大尺度行为由常速有效运动控制，到达时间误差估计为ε^{1/9-}量级
AI.significance: 首次将均匀化理论扩展到允许局部钉扎和负驱动力区域，更接近钉扎-脱钉转变的实际物理情景，为含杂质材料界面动力学提供新理论框架

title: On the density of the supremum of nonlinear SPDEs
summary:
We study the one-dimensional stochastic partial differential equation \begin{equation*} \frac{\partial u}{\partial t}(t,x) =
-κ\frac{\partial^4 u}{\partial x^4}(t,x) + ρ\frac{\partial^2 u}{\partial x^2}(t,x) + b(u(t,x)) + σ(u(t,x))\, \dot W(t,x), \end{equation*} posed on a bounded spatial domain, where $u$ is understood in the random field sense. Depending on the value of $κ$, this equation includes the nonlinear stochastic heat equation with Dirichlet or Neumann boundary conditions, as well as the linearized stochastic Cahn-Hilliard equation with Neumann boundary conditions. We prove that the supremum of the solution admits a density with respect to Lebesgue measure. Our approach is based on Malliavin calculus, and in particular on the version of the Bouleau-Hirsch criterion for suprema developed by Nualart and Vives. One of the main difficulties lies in the analysis of the argmax set of the solution and in showing that the Malliavin derivative is almost surely nondegenerate on this set. As a byproduct of our arguments, we also establish Hölder continuity properties for the Malliavin derivative of the solution as an $L^2-$valued process in the regimes considered in this work.

AI.tldr: 证明了带随机噪声的四阶偏微分方程解的极大值具有关于Lebesgue测度的密度
AI.motivation: 研究一维随机偏微分方程，该方程包含非线性随机热方程和线性化随机Cahn-Hilliard方程等特殊情况，旨在理解解的极值统计性质
AI.techniques: 主要使用Malliavin微积分，特别是Nualart和Vives发展的极值Bouleau-Hirsch准则，分析解的argmax集并证明Malliavin导数在该集上几乎必然非退化
AI.main_theorems: 证明了该随机偏微分方程解的极大值关于Lebesgue测度具有密度，并建立了Malliavin导数作为L^2值过程的Hölder连续性
AI.significance: 为随机偏微分方程极值统计提供了理论工具，将Malliavin微积分应用于高阶随机方程，对随机界面动力学和相变模型有重要意义
